content.speakerText: We've got plenty of pens and pads, but only one roll of tape left.
content.speakerTextCn: 笔和便签都够，但胶带只剩一卷了。

options.text: I'll take two, please. I need extra for the meeting.
Why don't you order more? This isn't enough.
I don't need any. Just throw it away.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'That's perfect, I'll take one.' 体现了合作态度和对有限资源的接受，符合场景中‘灵活调整需求’的要求。选项1虽然语法正确，但要求超出库存，不够合作；选项3是抱怨，语气不恰当；选项4态度消极，不符合职场沟通规范。

content.speakerText: We have five folders left, but no staplers in stock.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们还剩五个文件夹，但订书机已经没货了。

options.text: I'll take all five folders and find another place to buy staplers.
I want ten folders and a stapler right now.
Why do we even have folders? They're useless.
Can you just give me the stapler anyway?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了合理接受现有库存并主动寻找替代方案，符合职场合作精神。选项2要求超出库存且不合理；选项3消极否定，破坏团队氛围；选项4无视库存现实，强求不可能的物品。

content.speakerText: We have 20 notepads and three markers. The markers are almost out.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们有20个便签本和三个记号笔，记号笔快用完了。

options.text: I'll take five notepads and one marker — that should be enough.
I need all the markers and ten notepads — I'm the only one who uses them.
These are useless. Why don't we just switch to digital?
Can I have two markers even though you said there are only three?

content.explanation: 正确答案合理分配资源，尊重库存限制，语气合作。选项2自私且要求过多；选项3否定物品价值，不具建设性；选项4无视明确信息，强求额外资源���

content.template: I'd like ___ one roll of tape, please.
content.hint: 表达‘领取’库存物品时的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（take 表示领取物品）

content.template: We have ___ notebooks left, but no clipboards.
content.hint: 当库存充足时常用的表达方式
content.knowledgePoint: 库存描述高频表达（plenty of 表示充足）

content.template: I'll take ___ I can get — thanks for letting me know.
content.hint: 表达‘能给多少我就拿多少’的灵活态度
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（I'll take what I can get）

content.speakerText: We've got plenty of pens and pads, but only one roll of tape left.
content.speakerTextCn: 笔和便签都够，但胶带只剩一卷了。
expectedAnswers: One roll's fine, I'll take it.
I'll take one — thanks for checking the stock!
Could I get one for now? I might need more later, but this will do for today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了库存情况并表达了领取意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：语气礼貌、合作，符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'take', 'roll', 'one' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We have five folders and two staplers — the staplers are almost empty.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们有五个文件夹和两个订书机，订书机快用完了。
expectedAnswers: I'll take two folders and one stapler — that should be enough.
I'll take what's available — thank you for letting me know the stock status.
Could I have one stapler and three folders? I'll make sure to use them wisely.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否合理回应了库存限制并表达领取意愿
语言准确性：使用了正确的量词和动词搭配，如 'take', 'have', 'almost empty'
表达自然度：语气礼貌、务实，体现团队合作意识
关键词覆盖：使用了 'folders', 'staplers', 'stock', 'take' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: We're out of highlighters, but we have 15 pens and three notepads left.
content.speakerTextCn: 记号笔已经用完了，但我们还剩15支笔和三个便签本。
expectedAnswers: I'll take three pens and one notepad — I don't need highlighters right now.
Can I get three pens and the three notepads? I'll let you know if I need more later.
Thanks for the update — I'll take what's available and order highlighters separately.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确理解库存状态并做出合理回应
语言准确性：正确使用 'out of', 'left', 'take', 'order' 等表达
表达自然度：语气积极、有责任感，不抱怨或强求
关键词覆盖：使用了 'out of', 'left', 'take', 'order', 'available' 等场景关键词
